title: SQL Query Generator
scenario: Generate an SQL query to retrieve the names and email addresses of all users who live in the city of Paris and have a birthday in the month of July. The users table has the following columns: id, name, email, city, birthday. The query should use a subquery to filter the results.
constraints: Must use a subquery to filter results

evaluationCriteria.description: The query uses a subquery to filter results
The query includes a SELECT statement
The query includes a FROM statement
